auto_classification.justification: The patent discloses an integrated reliability design framework for ruggedized Liquid Crystal Display (LCD) assemblies based on Commercial-Off-The-Shelf (COTS) components used in avionics, defense, transportation, and industrial environments. The primary domain is Electronics due to the emphasis on manufacturing processes such as conformal coating and optical bonding, operator training, and skill certification, configuration management, controlled manufacturing environment, electrostatic discharge (ESD) protection, approved material procurement, reliability-driven design analysis, component stress management and derating, early failure mode identification, environmental stress screening, environmental qualification testing, and reliability-controlled manufacturing processes. The secondary domain is Optics / Display because of the focus on ruggedization and design modifications for Commercial-Off-The-Shelf (COTS) LCD modules.
